layman_headline: Fear grips crypto markets — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in a fearful state with most altcoins in downtrends and Bitcoin dominance high at 56.5%, meaning money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin. While a few coins like ZEC and LDO have had recent rallies, those moves look extended and risky to chase. None of the candidates offer a clean entry with strong technicals and a clear catalyst right now. The smartest move is to wait for a better setup rather than force a trade in unfavorable conditions.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines with cash ready. Watch for ETH to pull back toward $1,800 support or for market fear to deepen further (below 20) which historically creates the best buying opportunities. Don't rush in.
expert_reasoning: Scanning all 10 candidates reveals no high-conviction setups. BONK has the most oversold RSI (31) but its chart is strongly bearish (-2.0 bias) with Three Black Crows and Bearish Marubozu — classic falling knife territory. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but RSI at 59 and +15.7% weekly gain means it's already extended with a terrible 0.38x risk/reward ratio. ETH shows RSI at 39 (reliable signal per our credibility data at 80% win rate) and has 5-day momentum of +17.2%, but it remains below all major MAs with a -0.7 chart bias. BTC dominance at 56.5% is hostile to altcoin positions. The prudent approach is to wait for ETH to retest $1,800 support or for a broader market catalyst to improve conditions.
risk_factors: BTC weekend trading with geopolitical oil risk could trigger a sharp downturn across all crypto
BTC dominance at 56.5% continues to suppress altcoin performance — alts could bleed further
FTX distributing $900M to creditors may create selling pressure as recipients liquidate recovered crypto
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — a bounce there with rising volume would be actionable
Fear & Greed Index — if it drops below 20 (Extreme Fear), historically the best swing entries emerge
ZEC momentum — if the Zcash privacy node narrative sustains, a pullback to $210-area could offer entry
market_context: The crypto market sits in Fear territory (28/100) with BTC holding steady around $64,654 while altcoins broadly underperform. High BTC dominance at 56.5% signals risk-off rotation and makes altcoin swing trades particularly treacherous right now.
context_banner: Market fear and high BTC dominance create a hostile environment for altcoin entries — capital preservation is the priority until cleaner setups emerge.

key_signals.description: ETH RSI at 39 is approaching oversold — our most reliable signal (80% win rate) — but chart structure remains bearish, suggesting waiting for $1,800 support test.
Fear reading of 28 is elevated but not extreme; historically the best entries come at Extreme Fear (<20), suggesting patience will be rewarded.
FTX $900M creditor distribution in fifth payment round could create near-term selling pressure across major tokens as creditors liquidate.
Bitcoin trading through dangerous weekend with 20% of world's oil supply at geopolitical risk — potential for sharp volatility in either direction.
No candidate has both favorable chart bias AND good risk/reward — LDO's bullish Three White Soldiers is offset by 0.38x R/R, while BONK's oversold RSI is negated by strongly bearish -2.0 chart bias.
